PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?coFounder ?coFounderLabel WHERE {
  wd:Q83431 p:P112 ?statement .
  ?statement ps:P112 ?coFounder .
  ?coFounder rdfs:label ?coFounderLabel .
  FILTER(?coFounder != wd:Q187165 && LANG(?coFounderLabel) = 'en')
}
